## Risk and Review

## Checklist

- [ ] The outcome, scope, and related issue are clear.
- [ ] Tests and required checks pass, with evidence included above.
- [ ] Statistical, security, client-data, dependency, and license risks are reviewed.
- [ ] Compatibility, migration, rollback, documentation, and release impact are addressed.
- [ ] Material AI assistance and human verification are disclosed.
- [ ] Required reviewers have reviewed the final material state.
